ops.text: trail slice diffs lose multiplicity: internal/trail/trail.go:127 diffs slices as identity sets, so two identical appends (same actor, text, model, second) produce no perceived delta for the second commit and it vanishes from `history`. Affects log entries and now investigation timelines alike. Surfaced by a sol refuter pass during the investigation-kind build (2026-07-18); pre-existing, deferred as out of scope there.
